diary.part1:
[The text of the first part of the diary] Hello, seekers...
I found a strange abandoned city, completely covered in black glowing mass and shimmering blue dots.

But that's not all.
There is a guardian in this city.
I call him the Warden.
diary.part2:
[The text of the second part of the diary] A lot of time has passed...
I found a way to walk calmly in this city without making noise.
The Skulk and ancient ruins no longer react to me — I walk very slowly.

But now I realized something else.
I cannot interact directly with the black mass.
It seems alive… but at the same time dead.

The Skulk…
Haha. I don't even understand why I named it this way and why it attracts me so much.
diary.part3:
[The text of the third part of the diary] The black mass behaves strangely.
Sometimes I feel it guides me, and sometimes it seems to try to stop me.

The Skulk stays nearby, almost like a guide.
I still don't understand its nature, but now it seems like a key to the city's secret.

The Warden watches. His silence presses on me as if he knows everything I do.
diary.part4:
[The text of the fourth part of the diary] Today I noticed something new.
The Warden seems to guard something more than just this city.
His presence is felt even where he is not.

The black mass pulses with a strange light, and the Skulk reacts to it.
It seems to “remember” events I can't even imagine.

If I want to understand this city — I have to understand its guardian.
diary.part5:
[The text of the fifth part of the diary] I approached the newly appeared Warden.
Every movement of his creates a terrifying feeling that presses on the mind.
And then I realized: to move forward, I must confront him face to face.

My time here grows, I feel something pressing on me.
And I sense that something important is about to happen.
diary.part6:
[The text of the sixth part of the diary] I feel the presence of something long hidden.
The Hungry Soul… It has been trapped here, waiting to be freed.
The Warden holds it captive, and only his death can release it.

If I kill the Warden, this soul will open the way to a new world.
I don't know what awaits me there, but the way back is closed.
diary.part7:
[The text of the seventh part of the diary] He fell. The Warden no longer holds this entity.
The Hungry Soul broke free — and with its liberation, the world around me seemed to change.
It begged me to feed it living beings.
From it radiates an invisible field reminiscent of shards of the past, thousands of years ago.
I fed it, and it promised to grant one of three wishes: make me rich, make me happy, or show me something I have never seen.
Completely absorbed by curiosity, I chose the third option — to show me something I have never seen. We went to the portal of the ancient city.
When we arrived, I felt the unknown energy of something new calling me forward.
The soul began interacting with the portal, after which it opened. The portal is open. I can go further.
But what lies beyond — no one knows. I asked the soul, it refused to answer.
Now it all depends on whether I can take the step… and enter the unknown.
